content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 17, 1999

Ted Dutton
United Water Management Co., Inc.
1905 Business Center Drive, Suite 101
San Bernardino, California 92408

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-99-251

Dear Mr. Dutton:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹

I am attaching a fact sheet which should answer your questions regarding the post-
employment restrictions. If after reading the enclosed fact sheet you still have questions, please
do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,

Steven G. Churchwell
General Counsel

By: [signature] Lynda Doherty
Lynda Doherty
Political Reform Consultant, Legal Division

SGC:LD:tls

Enclosure

¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 -
18995, of the California Code of Regulations.
